Actions.Text: HELD FOR CONSIDERATION IN GOVERNMENTAL OPERATIONS

Title: Relates to divestiture of public funds in the Russian energy sector
Summary: Requires divestment of public funds in the Russian energy sector.
LawCode: Add §165-b, St Fin L; add §103-h, Gen Muni L; add §2879-d, Pub Auth L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the state finance law, the general municipal law and the public authorities law, in relation to Russia divestment
